name: Tirzepatide
eyebrow: Dual GIP / GLP-1 Receptor Research Compound
summary: Tirzepatide is a peptide-based compound studied for its activity at GIP and GLP-1 receptor pathways involved in metabolic signaling research.
simple_mechanism: Tirzepatide is studied as a dual-receptor agonist because researchers examine its activity across both GIP and GLP-1 receptor pathways.
disclaimer: For laboratory research purposes only. Not for human consumption. This information is educational and is not medical advice. Products are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
